holdings.n: First American Treasury Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: EASY is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 5.81%, Casey's General Stores at 5.76%, UnitedHealth Group at 5.58%, Cardinal Health at 5.56%, and Johnson & Johnson at 4.87%.

overview.description: The Liberty One Defensive Dividend Growth ETF (EASY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in US large-cap companies with a strong history of rising dividends. The fund targets capital appreciation and income by emphasizing defensive sectors the adviser deems recession resistant. EASY was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Liberty One.
